elements.label: Description
elements.value: The largest spawnable tier. Rare spawn. Merges into Apple.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/persimmon.schema.json, set ct_pers_radius to {{ct_pers_radius}}]
Set Persimmon radius to {{ct_pers_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/persimmon.schema.json, set ct_pers_score to {{ct_pers_score}}]
Set Persimmon merge score to {{ct_pers_score}} points.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/persimmon.schema.json, set ct_pers_weight to {{ct_pers_weight}}]
Set Persimmon spawn weight to {{ct_pers_weight}}.
